sharedTemplate.bodyTemplate:
Hi there,

I came across {{businessName}} and noticed {{hook}}.

We're Rapid Rank Agency -- we build, host, and maintain websites, handle upgrades, and do a bit of SEO too, basically everything involved in getting a business a proper digital presence. We also work with Zero Touch AI (zerotouchai.com) on the automation side -- they specialize in AI-driven social media and business automation, if that's ever useful down the line.

Want me to put together a free demo of what a site for {{businessName}} could look like? No cost, no obligation either way -- just reply and let me know.

Best,
Rapid Rank Agency

categoryHooks.nail salon: clients probably book you through Instagram DMs or word of mouth right now, with no easy way to see your services or prices online
categoryHooks.spa: people nearby are likely finding you through Google Maps or referrals alone, without a real page to show your services
categoryHooks.massage therapist: clients are probably booking by phone or word of mouth, with no easy way to see your rates or availability
categoryHooks.photographer: your portfolio's likely scattered across Instagram instead of living in one place people can actually browse
categoryHooks.event planner: people planning with you probably can't see past work or packages without messaging you directly first
categoryHooks.bakery: people nearby might not even know you exist unless they've driven by or heard from a friend
categoryHooks.catering company: clients probably can't see your menu or get a quote without calling first
categoryHooks.bridal shop: brides-to-be searching online might be missing you entirely in favor of shops that actually show up in search
categoryHooks.tattoo shop: people scouting artists' portfolios online might not be finding yours at all
categoryHooks.florist: orders for weddings and events might be going to competitors who show up in a quick search
categoryHooks.yoga studio: new students trying to check your class schedule probably have no way to do that without calling
categoryHooks.martial arts studio: parents researching programs for their kids can't easily compare what you offer online
categoryHooks.pet grooming service: pet owners searching for a groomer nearby might be missing you entirely
categoryHooks.chiropractor: new patients researching providers can't easily find your credentials or book online
categoryHooks.physiotherapy clinic: referrals from doctors might dead-end if patients can't find you online to confirm details
categoryHooks.veterinary clinic: pet owners searching for a vet nearby in an emergency might not find you in time
categoryHooks.dentist: new patients comparing dentists online are probably choosing whoever actually has a website
categoryHooks.restaurant: people checking your hours or menu before heading over might be stuck guessing
categoryHooks.insurance broker: people comparing brokers online are likely not finding you at all
categoryHooks.mortgage broker: clients researching brokers before reaching out can't easily see your rates or credentials

defaultHook: you don't currently have a website, which likely means people searching for a business like yours online aren't finding you
